# Point Zero AI

> Point Zero AI builds Smart Response Systems for service businesses — websites that answer questions, qualify leads, and book appointments, even after hours. Founded by Tom Zgainer, who previously built and sold America's Best 401k (8,000+ businesses, $1B+ saved in fees) and was featured in Tony Robbins' bestselling books MONEY: Master the Game and Unshakeable.

## What We Build

Smart Response Systems combine a refreshed or rebuilt website with AI voice agents, chat agents, and automated booking. Four packages: Smart Site Refresh ($3,500), Smart Site + Voice Agent ($7,500), Full Response System ($12,500), and Custom AI Implementation ($15,000+).

## Who We Serve

Experienced business owners — typically 50+ — running service-based businesses with $500K–$5M annual revenue. Strong fit for HVAC, plumbing, roofing, electrical, restoration, foundation repair, septic, tree removal, dental, legal, veterinary, and similar service businesses where the owner currently misses after-hours calls and wants AI to handle the calls they can't answer themselves.

## How To Engage

Every prospect starts with the free Business Gap Assessment — 18 questions, 5 minutes, identifies which of seven gap types are bleeding the business. Results lead to a Gap Review call where the right package is scoped to the specific gaps found.

## Founder

Tom Zgainer — 30+ years in business. Built and sold America's Best 401k, which served 8,000+ businesses and helped working families collectively save over $1 billion in retirement plan fees. Featured in Tony Robbins' MONEY: Master the Game and Unshakeable. Has appeared on CNBC, Fox Business, Bloomberg, Yahoo Finance, and HuffPost.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.pointzeroai.com): Overview of Smart Response Systems, package tiers, and Tom's background
- [Business Gap Assessment](https://www.pointzeroai.com/assessment): Free 5-minute assessment identifying which gaps are leaking leads, time, and clients
- [AI Business Stack](https://www.pointzeroai.com/ai-business-stack): The exact stack used to build Point Zero AI from zero — $600K of business infrastructure for $300/month

## Companion Products

- [StreamTracker](https://www.getstreamtracker.com): iOS app built solo by the same team — proof of practical AI build capability
